meaning: adj.有娘娘腔的,柔弱胆小的n.<美俚>脂粉气质的男人
examples: Did you hear what happened to Cissy?
Cissy, you must not do this, you can't trust him.
As CISSY says, you are a good girl, pretty and companionable.
If her intent was to protect Bobbi Kristina beyond age 30, as Cissy and Marion believe, then Whitney should not have left it to chance.
It is not clear how much protection Cissy and Marion feel she needs, because their Petition does not ask for a specific change to the trust.
